alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Maximum levels for contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995) and other relevant codes of practice.. Codex establishes maximum levels (MLs) for contaminants in food or feed commodities, which are legally permitted to protect human health. The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses these levels.

alerts.title: Added: Iran Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Manual review required. Automated extraction failed: {"error":{"code":503,"message":"This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.","status":"UNAVAILABLE"}}

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Comply with limits. All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits on food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed. Food products containing non-permitted additives must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only permitted. Only food additives assessed and permitted by SFA are allowed.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants / Incidental constituents
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Comply with limits. All food businesses must comply with regulatory limits on contaminants.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed. Food products with contaminants exceeding regulatory limits must not be imported or sold.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Diethylstibestrol, Hexoestrol, Dienoestrol
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Import or sale of meat and derived food containing these residues is prohibited.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Declared on label. All ingredients and additives in prepacked foods must be declared on labels.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibition. Certain foods are prohibited from production, import, or sale. Verification is required to ensure the product is not on this list.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Delisted from FDA regulations. Delisted color additives are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30).

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - "Gluten-free" claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Defined standard for gluten content. The FDA issued a final rule defining “gluten-free” for food labeling. A separate rule (August 12, 2020) establishes compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the “gluten-free” claim.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117) establishes requirements for allergen preventive controls to prevent allergen cross-contact in manufacturing and packaging and to prevent undeclared allergens. Facilities must put written procedures in place.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Identified as allergenic substances that must be declared on the label.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The food source name must appear in parentheses following the name of the ingredient.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of specific tree nut, fish, and Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. The type of tree nut, and the species of fish and Crustacean shellfish must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Required to be identified on labels due to potential hypersensitivity reactions.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Must be declared on food labels when present at or above this concentration.

alerts.title: Removed: Bangladesh Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: China Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives and their conditions of use
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. The GSFA Online Database provides all adopted provisions, searchable by additive, functional class, and food category. Users are encouraged to consult the Preamble for interpretation.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices
alerts.details: New: Adherence to Code of Practice required. The Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices (CXC 78-2017) provides guidance for minimizing mycotoxin contamination in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in Spices
alerts.details: Old: Follow Code of Practice for the Prevention and Reduction of Mycotoxins in Spices. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - Specific limits and requirements for food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to food additives in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Specific requirements for allergen declaration and lists
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to allergen declaration in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - Specific limits and requirements for chemical and physical contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to contaminant limits in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Specific requirements for general labelling and warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to labelling requirements and warnings for processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - Specific limits and requirements for microbiological contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to microbiological limits in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Specific limits and requirements for salt/sodium content
alerts.details: New: Verification required from relevant regulations. Refer to the 282 regulations under 'Pangan Olahan' on the JDIH BPOM website, especially PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019 Tentang Kategori Pangan, for specific details applicable to salt/sodium limits in processed foods (including seasoning and snack products).
